mapper.sql: id, service_id, capability_tag, description, max_concurrent, weight, health_status, avg_response_time_ms, version_no, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_service_capabilities (service_id, capability_tag, description, max_concurrent, weight, health_status) VALUES (#{serviceId}, #{capabilityTag}, #{description}, #{maxConcurrent}, #{weight}, #{healthStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_service_capabilities SET capability_tag = #{capabilityTag}, description = #{description}, max_concurrent = #{maxConcurrent}, weight = #{weight}, health_status = #{healthStatus}, version_no = version_no + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version_no = #{versionNo} AND deleted = b'0'
UPDATE mcp_service_capabilities SET deleted = b'1' WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = b'0'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mcp_service_capabilities WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = b'0'
SELECT FROM mcp_service_capabilities WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND deleted = b'0'
SELECT FROM mcp_service_capabilities WHERE capability_tag = #{capabilityTag} AND deleted = b'0' ORDER BY weight DESC
SELECT FROM mcp_service_capabilities WHERE deleted = b'0'
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_service_capabilities SET health_status = #{healthStatus}, version_no = version_no + 1 WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND capability_tag = #{capabilityTag} AND deleted = b'0'
UPDATE mcp_service_capabilities SET avg_response_time_ms = #{avgResponseTimeMs}, version_no = version_no + 1 WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND capability_tag = #{capabilityTag} AND deleted = b'0'
